HEAT.description: Minor burns, +8 hits, 1 hit per round
Blinded by hot smoke, +12 hits, Stunned 1 round
Clothing catches on fire, takes 2 rounds to extinguish, +12 hits, +8 hits per round afire, stunned 1 round
Knocked down by fiery blast, any organic foot and calf covering destroyed, +10 hits
Blast to head, face horribly scarred, knocked out, +15 hits, +5 hits per round, if no helm: a 1 month coma results
Fire engulfs back, knocked down, all organic material on back destroyed, 2 hits per round, stunned 1 round
Strike to head, blinded for 6 rounds, any organic head covering destroyed, if no helm: head hair destroyed
Head becomes a charred stump, sadly, dies instantly due to this unacceptable condition
Shield arm fried, any shield is destroyed along with hand, stunned 5 rounds, if no shield: loses arm and knocked out
Upper leg burn, use of leg lost due to tissue destruction, 2 hits per round, -60 to activity, stunned for 6 rounds
Blast to neck fuses vertebrae and unites skin with clothing, paralyzed permanently, +25 hits
Blast to leg, +2 hits per round, -20 to activity, if no leg armor: massive tissue damage, -70 to activity
Head strike, if helm: blinded for 2 weeks, if not: dies in 6 rnds due to massive shock and brain damage
Midsection vaporized, cut in half and dies, clothing, armor, and all items destroyed
Blast to chest, any chest armor destroyed, +12 hits, stunned 3 rounds, if no chest armor: knocked down, 6 hits per round
Fire engulfs body, all organic material on body destroyed, dies of shock and nerve damage in 6 rnds, +25 hits
All that remains are charred bits of teeth and bone

COLD.description: Cold blast, +3 hits, if no cloak or armor +6 hits and stunned 1 round
Frosty burn, +7 hits, 1 hit per round
Mild frostbite, +5 hits, 2 hits per round and -10 to activity
Back strike, +9 hits, 2 hits per round, stunned 2 rounds, wood exposed on back is useless and brittle
Strong but low blast, stunned 1 round, any foot covering destroyed, if no foot covering: frostbite and -30 to activity
Icy blast to head, a month long coma (and head cold) results, Loses nose as a result of severe frostbite and shock
Strike to leg, knocked down, stunned for 3 rounds, if no leg armor: frostbite, lower leg useless and -40 to activity
Strike to neck and collar area, knocked out, lose outer ear, if no neck armor: neck is frozen and dies in 9 inactive rounds
Blast freeze-dries head, dies in 2 rounds, skull and brain are brittle and lifeless
Thigh iced, broken bone and frostbite, +5 hits per round, -30 to activity, stunned for 4 rounds
Side strike freezes and shatters pelvis, dies in 12 rounds due to shock and nerve damage
Head strike, eyes are frozen, a 3 week coma results, paralyzed from the neck down
Blast freezes both hands, loses use of both arms for 1 hour, 6 hits per round, stunned for 5 rounds
Heart and lungs suddenly frozen, dies in 6 inactive rounds of shock and suffocation
Massive strike shatters chest and freezes precious bodily fluids, dies in 3 rounds
Icy blast to upper chest, knocked down and out, if no chest armor: dies in 10 rounds due to a cold, cold heart
Frozen into a lifeless statue, well preserved, but quite dead
Frozen solid, then shatters into thousands of pieces after being slammed into the ground

ELECTRICITY.description: Light charge, +3 hits, if metal armor stunned 1 round
Medium charge, +6 hits, -5 to activity, if metal armor stunned 2 rounds
Heavy charge, +9 hits, -10 to activity, stunned 1 round, if metal armor stunned 3 rounds
Strike to shield arm, +12 hits, -20 to activity, if metal armor and no shield: knocked out for 1 day
Strike to side devastates nervous system, servere shock results, vistim is a living vegetable for 1 month
Strike to weapon arm, 2 hits per round, if no leather arm armor: muscle and cartilage mangled, arm useless, stunned 6 rounds
Permeated by electricity, entire nervous system rearranged, drops and lies in shock for 12 rounds before dying
Head strike, if leather helm: it is destroyed, 2 week coma results, if not: dies instantly as brain is fried
Chest strike, if metal armor: it becomes fused and immobile, if not: knocked out for 6 hours
Electrifying experience, brain falls victim to massive shock and surface burns, passes out and dies in 6 rounds
Nervous system acts as a superconductor, instant death provides all with a fine light show
Strike to face, loses nose, stunned 8 rounds, blinded for 2 weeks, if no helm: knocked down as well
Strike destroys heart, lungs, if metal chest armor: it is fused, dies in 6 rnds, If not: dies instantly
Head is no longer available for use, smoke and ozone surround the lifeless body
Abdomen strike, stunned 7 rounds, 6 hits per round, if no armor over abdomen: dies of shock and bleeding in 12 rounds
Chest strike destroys both lungs, Cut in half, charge extends 10 feet giving an A critical to anyone in the way
Charge disrupts cell structure, entire body turned to dust

IMPACT.description: Staggered by strike to side, +10 hits, stunned 1 round
Strike to shoulder, spun about, reel backwards 10 feet, +12 hits, if no armor stunned 2 rounds
Strike to leg, knocked down, +8 hits, if no leg armor stunned 2 rounds
Blast to shield arm +10 hits, Shield or arm armor destroyed, if none: arm broken and useless, stunned 3 rounds
Strike to head, +12 hits, helm is shattered, knocked down and out for 1 day, if no helm: skull fractured, dies in 3 rounds
Blow to upper Leg, muscles torn, +15 hits, -10 to activity, if no leg armor: -20 to activity and stunned 3 rounds
Blast to collar area, +12 hits, stunned 5 rounds, cannot speak for 1 week, if no neck armor: voice loss is permanent
Neck strike, +20 hits paralyzed from the shoulders down, a melancholy mood falls on victim
Blow to knee, knee dislocated, cartilage and tendons ripped, +15 hits, -50 to activity, stunned 9 rounds
Strike to abdomen, +18 hits, stunned 12 rounds, if no abdomen armor: dies in 6 rounds due to destroyed organs
Blast to head fractures skull, a 3 week coma results, if no helm: dies immediately
Blow to jaw, jaw broken, cannot speak or eat solid food until healed, +15 hits, stunned 7 rnds
Blow to side, bone is driven into kidneys, dies in 6 rounds
Disrupt chest, lungs and heart explode from impact, dies instantly, very messy
Spun by blow, knocked down, breaks both arms, -60 to activity, stunned 3 rounds
Blast shatters skull into thousands of particles, dies instantly, direct hit, line punch
Blast annihilates entire skeleton, reduced to a gelatinous pulp, try a spatula.

CRUSH.description: Minor fracture of ribs, +5 hits, -5 to activity
Blow to side, +4 hits, -40 to activity for 1 round
Blow to forearm, +5 hits, if no arm armor, stunned 1 round
Blow to shield shoulder breaks shield, if no shield: shoulder broken, arm useless
Blow breaks bone in leg, +12 hits -40 to activity, stunned 2 rounds
Strike to forehead, +30 hits, one eye destroyed, stunned 24 rnds, if no helm: a 1 month coma results
Blow to weapon arm, +8 hits, stunned 2 rounds, if no arm armor tendon damaged, arm broken and useless
Shatter knee, +9 hits, -60 to activity, knocked down and stunned for 3 rounds
Blow to back of neck paralyzes from the shoulders down, +25 hits, foe quite stunned
Unconscious for 4 hours due to blow to side of head, if no helm: skull crushed, +20 hits
Blast to chest sends rib cage through lungs, drops and dies in 6 rounds, vicious
Blow to jaw, drives bone into brain, dies instantly
Blow breaks hip, +15 hits, -75 to activity, knocked down and stunned 3 rounds
Neck strike crushes throat, cannot breath and stunned for 12 rounds, poor fool then expires
Blast to chest area, destroys heart, dies immediately, +25 hits, fine work
Sever spine, collapses immediately, paralyzed from the neck down permanently, +20 hits
Strike through leg, artery severed, down and unconscious, 12 hits per round
Savage blow to head, knocked down, dies in 12 rounds due to severed vein

SLASH.description: +0 hits, weak strike yields no extra damage
Minor calf wound, +1 hit per round
Blow to upper leg, +5 hits, if no leg armor: +3 hits and 2 hits per round
Minor chest wound, +3 hits, 1 hit per round, -5 to activity
Minor forearm wound, +4 hits, 2 hits per round, stunned 1 round
Medium thigh wound, +6 hits, 1 hit per round, -10 to activity, stunned 2 rounds
Neck strike severs carotid artery, neck broken, dies in 1 round of intense agony
Slash weapon arm, +10 hits, 1 hit per round, if no arm armor: muscle and tendon damage, arm useless
Destroys one eye, +10 hits, stunned for 30 rounds
Disemboweled, dies instantly, 25% chance your weapon is stuck in opponent for 2 rounds
Knocked out for 6 hours with a strike to side of head, +15 hits, if no helm: dies instantly
Sever lower leg, +20 hits per round, drops and lapses into unconsciousness
Slash side, down, unconscious and dies in 3 rounds due to massive internal organ damage
Major abdominal wound, +10 hits, 8 hits per round, -10 to activity, stunned for 4 rounds
Crushes hip, +35 hits, stunned for 2 rounds, active the following 4 rounds, but then dies of nerve failure
Sever weapon arm, +15 hits per round, down and unconscious immediately
Strike to head destroys brain, life is hard for the unfortunate fool, expires in a heap, immediately
Strike through kidneys, +9 hits, knocked down and dies after 6 rounds of very intense agony, sad
Great side shot, knocked down and sideways 5 feet, lower leg broken, stunned 7 rounds, -40 to activity

PUNCTURE.description: +0 hits, glancing blow, no extra damage
Thigh strike, +3 hits, if no leg armor: 3 hits per round
Minor forearm wound, +2 hits, if no arm armor: stunned I round
Strike along side of chest, 1 hit per round, stunned I round
Strike to lower leg, tendons torn, +3 hits, -25 to activity, stunned 1 round
Strike to neck, nerves and blood vessels severed, dies of a massive heart failure
Strike to weapon arm, +10 hits, if no arm armor: bone broken, stunned 3 rounds
Strike through lower leg, sever muscle, -50 to activity, stunned 3 rounds
Strike through both lungs, drops and passes out, dies in 6 rounds
Strike to side of head, knocked out for 6 hours, +10 hits, if no helm: dies instantly
Strike through neck breaks backbone and severs spine, paralyzed from the neck down, permanently
Strike through eye, dies instantly, a real eye full
Major abdominal wound, +10 hits, 6 hits per round, -20 to activity, stunned 4 rounds
Shatter elbow in weapon arm, arm useless, stunned 5 rounds
Impaled in heart, dies instantly, heart destroyed, 25% chance your weapon is stuck in foe 3 rounds
Nailed in lower back, down and unconscious, dies from internal bleeding and shock in 6 rounds
Shot through both ears, hearing impaired, dies instantly, awesome shot
Blow to shield shoulder, stunned 9 rounds, -20 to activity, if no shield: unconscious and upper arm shattered

UNBALANCING.description: Arm strike, +2 hits, -5 to activity for 2 rounds
Leg strike, +4 hits, if no leg armor stunned 1 round
Chest strike, knocked back 3 feet, +5 hits, -10 to activity for 2 rounds
Blow to shield arm, +5 hits. shield torn away, if no shield: +8 hits and stunned 2 rounds
Elbow strike, forearm numbed, +8 hits, drop weapon, -10 to activity for 10 rounds
Brutal hip strike, knocked down, tendon torn and joint shattered, leg useless, -80 to activity
Shot to side, knocked 5 feet sideways, drop anything carried in hands, stunned 3 rounds
Side strike, stumble ungracefully to an embarrassing prone position, stunned 6 rounds
Back strike, knocked flying 10 feet onto face, severe nerve damage, paralyzed from waist down
Hard head strike, knocked back 10 feet and stunned 6 rounds, if no helm: unconscious for 24 hours
Totally awesome strike, knocked to knees, if using 1 hand weapon: it is thrown backwards 10 feet, stunned 15 rounds
Upper chest strike, knocked 10 feet sideways, fall down, break both arms, a 2 month coma results
Blow breaks leg, +12 hits, -50 to activity, stunned 1 round
Blow to side crushes chest cavity, drops and dies in 3 rounds
Sever hand, +12 hits per round, knocked down and stunned for 6 rounds
Shot through heart, reels 10 feet to a spot suitable for dying, weapon stuck in spinning victim for at least 3 rounds
Strike to head, knocked 10 feet back +9 hits, stunned 6 rounds, if no helm: a 4 week coma results
Frightening strike to temple, knocked back 20 feet, dies instantly, not nice

GRAPPLING.description: Attack fended off, +3 hits, If arm armor: stunned 1 round
Leg attack, Spun about, but breaks loose, If leg armor, stunned 1 round
Shield arm entangled, lf shield: -50 to activity until it is dropped, If no shield: -50 to activity
Weapon arm grasped, Disarmed and wrist sprained, Stunned 2 rounds, -25 to activity
Both legs entangled, Down and knocked out, +9 hits
Weapon arm grappled, Ligaments torn and muscle pulled, Disarmed and stunned for 3 rounds, -40 to activity
Completely entangled and immobilized, Knocked down, but still conscious, No activity
Vicious hold around neck, Knocked out, Sprained neck: -60 to activity
Head grappled, Stunned 9 rounds, If no helm: a coma (1-10 days) results due to a fractured skull
Both arms entangled and pinned to chest, Arms may not be moved until entanglement removed, -75 to activity
Neck grappled, If neck armor: -60 to activity due to neck sprain and stunned 3 rounds, If not: dies from broken neck
Chest grasped, Ribs broken, Stunned 5 rounds, -10 to activity
Legs entangled and completely immobilized, Fall and break weapon arm, Disarmed and knocked out, +20 hits
Neck grappled, If neck armor: disarmed and stunned 5 rounds, If not: dies in 6 rounds
Foot entangled, Stumble, fall, break weapon on impact, and stunned 2 rounds, If no chest armor: take a "D" crush crit
Both legs wrapped up, Tumbles to ground and knocked out, -80 to activity due to a broken arm and a broken ankle
Windpipe crushed, Dies instantly due to massive shock and savage asphyxiation

PHYSICAL_LARGE.description: +10 hits, 20% chance a normal weapon breaks, 1% for a magic weapon
Staggered by strong blast, +20 hits, -10 to activity, Stunned 2 rounds
Fine leg strike, +18 hits, 5 hits per round, -20 to activity, Stunned 3 rounds
Well placed strike to neck severs the jugular vein, +15 hits, Dies in 6 rounds, but may act at -60 to activity until then
Hard blow, +25 hits, 3 hits per round due to light wound, -10 to activity, Stunned 2 rounds
Strike severs an artery in leg, May act at -30 to activity for 4 rounds, then drops and dies after 6 more rounds
Sever a vein in forelimb, +20 hits, Stunned for 6 rounds, then falls dead
Strike to leg, +15 hits, -20 to activity, 2 hits per round, Stunned 3 rounds
Strike to head, Skull fracture, +30 hits, Knocked out, Fine shot
Heart strike, Dies immediately, Weapon stuck and trapped under body, Chance that weapon broken is 60% - weapon bonus
Shatter shoulder in weapon arm, +15 hits, Stunned 3 rounds, Arm is quite useless
Vicious crossing strike, Blinded and upset, Stunned 2 rounds, but then the poor brute can blunder around
Strike through cheek, Dies immediately, Unfortunately, the weapon is stuck in the bone for 2 rounds
Strike to chin, Jaw shattered, Knocked out, +60 hits, A 1 month coma results
+20 hits, Strike through the eye, Dies instantly and falls upon attacker, who then takes 20 hits and is pinned for 6 rounds
Strike through ear destroys brain, The unfortunate lummox dies instantly, and any ear wax is removed

SPELL_LARGE.description: Size of creature awes you, +0 hits
Unbalanced by blast, +15 hits, Stunned 2 round
Staggered by strong blast, +20 hits, Stunned 1 round
Strike to leg, +15 hits, -20 to activity, Stunned 2 rounds
Blast into mouth, Knocked down, A month-long coma results, +30 hits
Spun about by blast, Off balance, +18 hits, -10 to activity, Stunned 1 round
Side strike, + 25 hits, -20 to activity due to broken ribs, Stunned 3 rounds
Strike to midsection, Bladder destroyed, Dies in 4 rounds, but is fully active until then
Head strike, Momentarily confused, +20 hits, Stunned 2 rounds
Blast buckles leg, Severe thigh wound, +25 hits, Dies in 5 rounds due to nerve damage, but is fully active until then
Vicious blast, Neck crunched and spine severed, Drops and dies in 3 rounds
Strike to eyes, Minded for 2 rounds, +15 hits, -20 to activity
Strike to body destroys a variety of organs, Dies in 3 rounds, but the ignorant brute is fully active until then
Superb strike drives rib through heart, Drops and dies in 6 agonizing rounds
